violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives, ice machine, ladle, tilt skillet) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items washed/sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Meatballs were observed held at 90 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Eel roll and spicy shrimp rolls labels did not list seafood as an allergen. PIC contacted vendor and pulled items from service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Inspector observed staff stacking wet dishes on a rack after washing/sanitizing via dishwasher. PIC unstacked during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - food containers (old labels) - mixers - walk-in shelves New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The floors (behind equipment/shelves) and walls (wall-in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Sliced tomatoes in the deli walk-in were observed with a white film. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (coffee) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
The following located in the kitchen area was not in good repair: -Gaskets on reach-in (near office) -Condensate pipe on cookline prep unit observed with a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Stand mixer -Refrigerator doors. Staff cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Technician is expected to service unit on 8/13/24. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Chicken was observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated to 170 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The cutting boards in the pizza area and service line are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Walk in cooler and walk in freezer was observed to have an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Several wall tiles by the plant-based area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The exhaust fan in the dish area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
FRP wall above tray line in dish area was observed with black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The ceiling tile in the deli prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Employees' earrings were observed stored in the shelving above three bay sinks. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
